Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given an example DECLARE model Our task is to add new constraints to mitigate bias in a loan application review process

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: First lets understand the existing model It has existence StartApplication and FinalDecision are required in every trace init StartApplication is the first activity coexistence StartApplication and FinalDecision must coexist response After StartApplication there must be a RequestAdditionalInfo at some point succession RequestAdditionalInfo must be followed by FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So these together imply that every trace has StartApplication then RequestAdditionalInfo then FinalDecision with the possibility of other activities in between

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Now we are to add constraints to mitigate bias The idea is that the process might have sensitive attribute checks like CheckApplicantRace that could lead to biased decisions We want to ensure fairness

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For instance if there is an activity that reveals sensitive attributes then a decision activity like Reject might follow directly which could be biased So we might want to prevent that direct succession

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Alternatively we might want to ensure that for applicants from sensitive groups a manual review is always performed

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: We do not have activities like CheckApplicantRace Approve Reject ManualReview in the original model We are allowed to introduce new activities

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: To add constraints that mitigate bias we need to have activities that represent sensitive attribute checks or bias mitigation steps

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: I will propose the following activities to add CheckSensitiveAttributes ManualReview Approve Reject BiasMitigationCheck

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: To keep the original model intact I can add new activities without removing old ones

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Given the constraints of DECLARE we might opt for a simpler approach require that ManualReview always occurs before any decision activity

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets combine several constraints to reduce bias Nonchainsuccession from CheckSensitiveAttributes to Approve and to Reject Response from CheckSensitiveAttributes to ManualReview Precedence from ManualReview to Approve and to Reject

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We might also want to tie ManualReview to FinalDecision as well To be safe we can add precedence from ManualReview to FinalDecision as well

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We might want to ensure that ManualReview occurs before any decision but we already have precedence

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We will add existence for CheckSensitiveAttributes Response CheckSensitiveAttributes to ManualReview Precedence ManualReview to Approve Reject and FinalDecision Nonchainsuccession CheckSensitiveAttributes to Approve Reject and FinalDecision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: If FinalDecision always occurs then ManualReview must occur in every trace because of the precedence constraint so we do not need to add existence for ManualReview
